event: management plan for allogeneic stem cell transplantation
abdominal and pelvic CT scan performed
segmental hypoenhancing area in the mid appendix
treated with broad-spectrum intravenous antibiotics consisting of meropenem
adjacent loop of small bowel with thickened wall
taken urgently to the operating room
appendix completely necrotic down to the base
terminal ileum segmentally necrotic at the contacting surface
skin left open to heal by secondary intention
admitted to the intensive care unit
CT scan of the chest performed
numerous peripheral cavitary lesions on CT chest
pathological diagnosis of zygomycosis from ileocecectomy specimen
H&E: thrombosed vessels filled with broad irregular aseptate hyphae
GMS: wide ribbon-like aseptate hyphae with broad-angle branching involving vessels and adjacent submucosa
GMS: fungal hyphae invading the muscularis propria of the appendix
antifungal therapy switched to amphotericin B
fungal overgrowth in the surgical wound
culture of the bronchoalveolar lavage recovered Absidia spp.
goals of care transitioned to comfort
